description: The per-event failure identifiers MAP_NOT_ARRAY and TRANSFORM_UNDEFINED at the node types the spec's error-identifier table names, beyond the filter case already pinned by OG-EX-25. OG-EX-32 pins a map node whose expression yields a defined non-array (MAP_NOT_ARRAY). OG-EX-33 pins a transform node whose expression yields undefined (TRANSFORM_UNDEFINED). Both are per-event failures: with onError set the error event (carrying the offending event) routes to the named node; unset, that error event is fatal.

fixtures.name: map of a defined non-array fails with MAP_NOT_ARRAY
fixtures.description: The map expression count yields the number 5, a defined non-array result, so the node fails with MAP_NOT_ARRAY rather than unpacking. The node sets onError to the output node, so the error event { error: MAP_NOT_ARRAY, event: <the input> } is emitted; the normal map->out path carries nothing on failure.

fixtures.name: transform yielding undefined fails with TRANSFORM_UNDEFINED
fixtures.section: Node definitions / transform; Transforms; Errors (error identifiers)
fixtures.description: The transform expression references a field absent from the event, so it evaluates to undefined (no result) and the node fails with TRANSFORM_UNDEFINED per the Transforms rule, exactly as OG-EX-25 pins for a filter. onError routes the error event { error: TRANSFORM_UNDEFINED, event: <the input> } to the output node.
